results.title: VIDEO: Muskrat Dam celebrates connection to Ontario power grid
results.description: Muskrat Dam held a celebration with provincial and federal dignitaries to celebrate the community's connection to the Ontario power grid.

results.title: Enerflex Ltd. Announces Extension of Revolving Credit Facility and Timing of Second Quarter Financial and Operational Results
results.description: All amounts presented in this release are in U.S. Dollar (“USD”) unless otherwise stated.

results.title: Melodeon Jazz Lounge Plans Dallas Design District Debut
results.description: Melodeon Jazz Lounge is headed to the Design District with plans for ticketed jazz shows, a Chicago-inspired tavern-style pizza menu and a 1950s-inspired interior

results.title: Rosauers expands in Gallatin Valley with new Belgrade location
results.description: On opening day, Rosauers offered a variety of product samples, and fresh bakery items to all customers exploring the new location off Jackrabbit Lane and Bandana Street.
